business.name: Pawfect Grooms
business.about: We're a small family-run grooming studio in the heart of Bristol, dedicated to keeping your dog looking and feeling their best. Every dog is treated with patience, care, and a lot of love.

booking.depositNote: A 25% deposit is required to secure your booking. This is deducted from your total on the day.

services.name: Bath & Brush
services.description: Full shampoo, conditioning rinse, blow-dry, and brush out. Leaves your dog clean, fresh, and tangle-free.

services.name: Full Groom
services.description: Everything in Bath & Brush plus scissor or clipper styling to breed standard or owner preference, nail trim, and ear clean.

services.name: Puppy Introduction
services.description: A gentle first grooming experience for puppies under 6 months. Short session designed to build positive associations with grooming.

services.name: Nail Trim
services.description: Quick nail clip and file. No bath required.

services.name: De-shedding Treatment
services.description: Specialist shampoo, deep conditioning, and high-velocity blow-dry to remove loose undercoat. Dramatically reduces shedding for 4–6 weeks.
services.suitableFor: Double-coated breeds (Huskies, Labs, Golden Retrievers, etc.)

staff.name: Sarah Mitchell
staff.bio: Sarah has been grooming dogs for over 10 years and holds a City & Guilds Level 3 in Dog Grooming. She started Pawfect Grooms in 2019 after years of working in busy salons. She specialises in doodles, spaniels, and terriers.

gallery.alt: Cockapoo after full groom — fluffy and styled
Golden Retriever after bath and brush

reviews.author: Emma T.
reviews.text: Sarah is absolutely brilliant with Biscuit. He used to be terrified of the groomer but now he trots in happily. The results are always gorgeous.

reviews.author: James W.
reviews.text: Best groomer in Bristol by far. Archie always comes back looking amazing and smelling great. Highly recommend the de-shedding treatment — life changing!

reviews.author: Priya K.
reviews.text: Really professional service. Easy online booking, reminder email the day before, and they were running on time. Will definitely be back.

seo.siteTitle: Pawfect Grooms | Dog Grooming in Bristol
seo.defaultDescription: Professional dog grooming in Bristol. Book online for bath & brush, full groom, and puppy introductions. Friendly, patient groomers.

legal.cancellationPolicy: We require 48 hours notice to cancel or reschedule your appointment. Cancellations with less than 48 hours notice will forfeit the deposit.
